title: rubus × pseudoplicatus
intro: Rubus × pseudoplicatus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry species. This plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoplicatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pseudoplicatus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
